title: Moderation Update – 2026-04-29
body: Actions taken today: • Banned spam_wave_42 (phishing links in multiple channels). • Banned toxic_runner (repeated harassment of newcomers). • Warned bot_like_user_77 (suspicious automated replies). • Dismissed false-positive report against core_maintainer (brigading). Reports 003 and 004 remain open for review (low/medium, no immediate action needed).
